title: Minecraft Outro Background/Panorama
description: Just adds the Official Minecraft Outro(Credits to Mojang) to the background of the Main Menu.
body:
**Minecraft Outro Resource Pack**

This pack adds the official Mojang Minecraft Outro used in their announcement videos.
All art and animation belong to Mojang — this pack simply brings that polished outro into the game.

✨ **What It Does**

Adds the official Mojang outro directly to your game

No gameplay changes — purely visual and aesthetic

Enhances the main menu with a clean, professional outro animation

Feels like something that should be in vanilla Minecraft

💡**Why Use It**

Makes the main menu feel more polished

Adds a small but satisfying visual touch

Doesn’t affect performance or gameplay in any way

❤️**Support the Project**

If you enjoy it or want to let me know it works, give the project a heart!
